texto: He didn't need someone to fix the problem - there was no fixing it. He needed someone to acknowledge his feelings. Accept his pain. Agree that his heart was broken, and that it should be. And that it might stay broken for a long, long time.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Julie Lawson Timmer sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “He didn't need someone to fix the problem - there was no fixing it. He needed someone to acknowle…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, heartbreak, someone, útil em momentos de reflexao.
